sprint: Fix real user-reported clone failure -- dangling scene-image asset reference
task: A second real clone failure on 'My Artwork Gallery', hit even with the overlay fix live: Check & Build showed a Layer referencing a missing asset 'scenes/single-holder/decoration.png'. Reproduced exactly with a real Free-hosted Image Experience (not the Text Experience the previous fix's reproduction used). Root cause: the earlier Repository-Only-Card-Open-Crash fix skips copying any compiled asset whose path starts with 'scenes/' (to avoid colliding with ProjectModel.scenes()'s prefix match), but left the Layer Pack's own reference to that path unrewritten -- a dangling reference Validation correctly flags. Fixed properly: scene-image asset bytes are now kept, re-homed under assets/legacy-scene-assets/<flattened-path>.png, and every Layer Pack/Layouts/Frame Variations reference to the old path is rewritten to the new one. Verified: the exact real reproduction now auto-Builds, auto-Validates clean, and auto-Publishes successfully. Full regression across 15 scripts + both goldenBuild.js suites (v1 and v2) unchanged. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
